description: After an unplanned shutdown of an offshore platform, a production engineer analyzes the event to correctly categorize the cause and the amount of deferred production.

nodes.task_description: Identify the start and end time of the platform shutdown from the event log.

expected_outcome.value: The exact duration of the downtime is determined.

nodes.task_description: Determine the root cause of the shutdown by reviewing alarms and operator logs (e.g., 'Compressor Failure').

expected_outcome.value: The root cause is correctly identified and categorized.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total volume of deferred production (oil and gas) by multiplying the downtime duration by the platform's normal production rate.

expected_outcome.value: The lost production volume is calculated and logged in the downtime tracking system.
